data_set_description.name: credit
data_set_description.description:
Dataset used in the tabular data benchmark https://github.com/LeoGrin/tabular-benchmark, transformed in the same way. This dataset belongs to the "classification on numerical features" benchmark.
    Original source: https://www.kaggle.com/competitions/GiveMeSomeCredit/overview Please give credit to the original source if you use this dataset.
data_set_description.creator: See source
